northflank.name: Northflank
northflank.short_description: Northflank is a deployment platform for running containers, databases, and AI/GPU workloads across AWS, GCP, Azure, and other clouds from one dashboard.
northflank.starting_price: Free Sandbox tier; paid compute plans from $2.70/month

features.description: Deploy services, jobs, and databases across AWS, GCP, Azure, Oracle Cloud, CoreWeave, or Civo, including bring-your-own-cloud setups.
features.title: Multi-cloud deployments

features.description: Run GPU-backed workloads and model inference, including open-source models like Llama4 and Deepseek.
features.title: GPU workloads and inference

features.description: Built-in CI/CD pipelines and GitOps workflows for automating builds and deployments.
features.title: CI/CD and GitOps

features.description: Automates Kubernetes cluster management across cloud environments without requiring manual cluster ops.
features.title: Kubernetes automation

features.description: Centralized secrets handling and multi-tenant project isolation for teams.
features.title: Secrets management and multi-tenancy

features.description: Spin up preview environments and sandboxes for testing changes before production.
features.title: Preview environments and sandboxes

pros: Supports multiple cloud providers and bring-your-own-cloud deployments
Pay-as-you-go pricing with a free Sandbox tier to start
Built-in support for GPU and AI inference workloads
SOC 2 Type 2 and HIPAA certified
cons: Compute pricing is broken into many named plan tiers, which can be confusing to compare
Enterprise-level SLAs and support require custom/quote-based pricing
No fixed-price low-end plan beyond the limited free Sandbox tier

faqs.answer: Yes, the Sandbox tier is free and includes 2 services, 1 database, and 2 cron jobs.
faqs.question: Does Northflank have a free plan?

faqs.answer: Northflank supports AWS, GCP, Azure, Oracle Cloud, CoreWeave, and Civo, plus bring-your-own-cloud deployments.
faqs.question: What clouds does Northflank support?

faqs.answer: Yes, Northflank offers GPU options including NVIDIA L4, A100, and H100 instances billed hourly.
faqs.question: Can I run GPU workloads on Northflank?

faqs.answer: Northflank was founded in 2019 and is headquartered in London, United Kingdom.
faqs.question: When was Northflank founded?

Broad compliance certifications (ISO 27001, HDS, GDPR, SecNumCloud option)
99.90% SLA, rising to 99.99% on the Premium tier
cons: No fixed pricing plans or numeric rates are published; customers must use a cost calculator or contact sales
Sovereign/compliance focus is centered on the EU, which may be less relevant for non-European customers

faqs.answer: By the second, reflecting actual usage, with users setting a maximum spend cap.

lemon-squeezy.name: Lemon Squeezy
lemon-squeezy.short_description: Lemon Squeezy is a merchant-of-record platform, now owned by Stripe, handling payments, tax compliance, and subscriptions for software sellers.

features.description: Takes on tax collection, calculation, and compliance liability across jurisdictions.
features.title: Merchant of record

features.description: Accepts payments from 135+ countries and 130+ currencies with up to 21 payment methods, including PayPal.
features.title: Global payment acceptance

features.description: AI-based fraud system to assess risk and reduce chargebacks.
features.title: Fraud protection

features.description: Handles failed card retries and customer emails to reduce involuntary subscription churn.
features.title: Dunning management

features.description: Single dashboard for viewing reconciled revenue across sales.
features.title: Reconciled revenue dashboard

features.description: Free to start with no trial requirement or contract.
features.title: No setup cost

pros: Single transaction fee (5% + $0.50) with no monthly fee
Acts as merchant of record, absorbing tax and compliance liability
Supports 135+ countries, 130+ currencies, and up to 21 payment methods
No setup cost or contract required to start
cons: Additional fees apply for international transactions (+1.5%), PayPal (+1.5%), subscriptions (+0.5%), abandoned cart recovery (+5%), and affiliates (+3%)
Now owned by Stripe and being evolved toward Stripe Managed Payments, which introduces migration uncertainty for existing merchants
Percentage-based pricing can be more costly at higher sales volumes than flat-rate processors

faqs.answer: Lemon Squeezy charges 5% + $0.50 per transaction with no monthly fee; additional fees apply for international payments, PayPal, subscriptions, abandoned cart recovery, and affiliates.
faqs.question: How much does Lemon Squeezy cost?

faqs.answer: No, Stripe acquired Lemon Squeezy in July 2024; the platform continues to operate under its own name while Stripe develops Stripe Managed Payments.
faqs.question: Is Lemon Squeezy still owned independently?

faqs.answer: It manages tax collection and calculation, compliance, fraud protection, and dispute handling on behalf of sellers.
faqs.question: What does Lemon Squeezy handle as a merchant of record?

faqs.answer: Up to 21 payment methods, including PayPal, across 135+ countries.
faqs.question: How many payment methods does Lemon Squeezy support?

features: +1.5% international, +1.5% PayPal, +0.5% subscriptions, +5% abandoned cart recovery, +3% affiliates
